basic_details.job_title: TISS Email Counselor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 10 Posts

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limit details. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Counselling or Clinical Psychology
qualification.details: Master's Degree in Counselling or Clinical Psychology Sound knowledge of therapeutic process skills and psychotherapy Experience in academic writing Good writing skills in both Hindi and English, and preferably 1 more regional language Skilled in the use of computers for documentation and email-based counselling Minimum 2 years commitment

salary_details.details: Rs. 17,000 - Rs. 19,000 per Month Up to Rs. 12,000 self-care allowance per annum and Mediclaim

selection_process: Brief training before starting Interview at TISS
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for TISS Email Counselor (Part-Time) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download TISS Email Counselor (Part-Time) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TISS Email Counselor position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the TISS Email Counselor (Part-Time) recruitment is 22nd June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in Counselling or Clinical Psychology to be eligible for the Email Counselor position.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Email Counselor post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies for the Part-Time Email Counselor position at TISS.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Email Counselor role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 17,000 to Rs. 19,000 per month, along with additional allowances.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely via email. You need to send your resume to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q6. Does TISS offer any additional benefits to the Email Counselors?
faq.answer: Yes, besides the monthly salary, candidates are eligible for up to Rs. 12,000 as a self-care allowance per annum and Mediclaim benefits.

faq.question: Q7. What are the key skills required for an Email Counselor at TISS?
faq.answer: Essential skills include knowledge of therapeutic processes, psychotherapy, academic writing, good Hindi and English writing abilities, and computer proficiency.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any minimum commitment period for this role?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates are expected to commit to a minimum of 2 years for this Part-Time Email Counselor position.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the TISS Email Counselor recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a brief training session followed by an interview conducted at TISS.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
